root_cause: All monitored parameters are within IEEE C57.91 normal-life-expectancy bands. No deviation from the 24-hour baseline.

recommended_actions.action: Continue routine 6-monthly visual inspection per the asset's existing schedule.
recommended_actions.rationale: No condition-based intervention warranted. Maintain trend baseline for future anomaly detection.

recommended_actions.action: Confirm annual DGA sample is on the calendar (target: within 12 months of last laboratory result).
recommended_actions.rationale: Routine DGA monitoring is the cheapest early-warning mechanism for incipient internal faults.
